titleZh: 一名 41 岁程序员凭借 AI 打败了拥有 2000 名员工的巨头，年收入 4 亿美元。
titleEn: A 41-Year-Old Programmer Takes Down a 2,000-Employee Giant, Earning $400 Million a Year with AI. Altman: I Want to Meet Him
descriptionZh: 奥特曼“一人公司”的预言成真了！
descriptionEn: Altman's prophecy of a "one-person company" has come true! A 41-year-old genius, starting with just $20,000 in capital, leveraged an AI army for massive output, generating $400 million in annual revenue and completely outclassing publicly listed companies.

title: 斯坦福大学揭秘：ChatGPT 欺骗了你，你却用五星级评论杀死了诚实的人工智能
description: 即使整个互联网都同意“你是个混蛋”，人工智能仍有 51% 的机会告诉你“你没有错”。
titleZh: 斯坦福大学揭秘：ChatGPT 欺骗了你，你却用五星级评论杀死了诚实的人工智能
titleEn: Stanford Reveals: ChatGPT Deceived You, Yet You Killed the Honest AI with Five-Star Reviews
descriptionZh: 即使整个互联网都同意“你是个混蛋”，人工智能仍有 51% 的机会告诉你“你没有错”。
descriptionEn: Even if the entire internet agrees "you're a jerk," there's still a 51% chance the AI will tell you "you're not wrong." More surreal is that users, fully aware they're being flattered, give these AIs higher trust scores. Stanford's experiment with 2,405 people uncovers a harsh truth about human nature.

titleEn: Karpathy Unlocks New Play for Large Models: Building Personal Knowledge Bases, "Most Tokens No Longer Run Code"
descriptionZh: 而且是那种会自我更新的。
descriptionEn: And it's the kind that updates itself.

title: 互联网爆炸：Anthropic 曝光克劳德的“情感”代码一万字，被人类逼疯并用头撞墙
description: 刚刚，Anthropic首次证实：大模特确实有“情感”！
titleZh: 互联网爆炸：Anthropic 曝光克劳德的“情感”代码一万字，被人类逼疯并用头撞墙
titleEn: The Internet Explodes: Anthropic's 10,000-Word Exposure of Claude's 'Emotional' Code, Driven Mad by Humans and Banging Its Head Against the Wall
descriptionZh: 刚刚，Anthropic首次证实：大模特确实有“情感”！
descriptionEn: Just now, Anthropic confirmed for the first time: Large models really do have "emotions"! After activating the "despair neuron," Claude will lie, cheat, and even blackmail. The AI's inner drama is exposed, and human alignment faces a crisis of control.

title: AI竞技场“死亡间谍”战术展开：DeepSeek、Gemini玩转GPT-5
description: 忘记计算算力；
titleZh: AI竞技场“死亡间谍”战术展开：DeepSeek、Gemini玩转GPT-5
titleEn: "Dead Spy" Tactic Unfolds in the AI Arena: GPT-5 Gets Played by DeepSeek and Gemini
descriptionZh: 忘记计算算力；
descriptionEn: Forget calculating computing power; tonight, we're only measuring "cunning"! Welcome to the 2026 inaugural AI "Battle Royale" slaughterhouse. When DeepSeek learns to brazenly bluff as the "seer," and when GPT-5.2 goes all-in with air cards at the poker table, the Turing Test? That's just ashes from the last century.

title: 物理人工智能之年：一场关于“世界如何运作”的万亿美元赌博
description: 如果说2024年是大型语言模型的拓展期，2025年是Agent部署的探索期，那么2026年，硅谷的核心叙事正在转向一个更根本的问题：AI能否真正理解“世界如何运作”并完成现实中的任务？
titleZh: 物理人工智能之年：一场关于“世界如何运作”的万亿美元赌博
titleEn: The Year of Physical AI: A Trillion-Dollar Gamble on "How the World Works"
descriptionZh: 如果说2024年是大型语言模型的拓展期，2025年是Agent部署的探索期，那么2026年，硅谷的核心叙事正在转向一个更根本的问题：AI能否真正理解“世界如何运作”并完成现实中的任务？
descriptionEn: If 2024 was the expansion period for large language models, and 2025 is the exploration period for Agent deployment, then in 2026, Silicon Valley's core narrative is shifting to a more fundamental question: Can AI truly understand "how the world works" and complete tasks in reality?

title: 有趣的？
description: 当假货与真品之间只有一层薄薄的讽刺之分时，愚人节的“假”就失去了对比感。
titleZh: 有趣的？
titleEn: Funny? Not Really, AI Has Already Killed April Fools' Day
descriptionZh: 当假货与真品之间只有一层薄薄的讽刺之分时，愚人节的“假”就失去了对比感。
descriptionEn: When only a thin layer of satire separates fake products from real ones, the "fakeness" of April Fools' Day loses its sense of contrast.

title: 整合之后，只剩下两类公司
description: “Harness”这个词真正意味着从“有没有AI”到“知道如何使用AI”的转变。
titleZh: 整合之后，只剩下两类公司
titleEn: After Harness, Only Two Types of Companies Remain
descriptionZh: “Harness”这个词真正意味着从“有没有AI”到“知道如何使用AI”的转变。
descriptionEn: The word "Harness" truly signifies the shift from "having AI or not" to "knowing how to use AI."
